evidence: The budget for construction of the projects currently under construction and the contracted projects is over $12 billion.

Maximo is an AI-enabled robot that enhances solar module installation speed, efficiency, and safety... AES had a fleet of five Maximo units in operation that assisted with construction at the 2 GW Bellefield solar-plus-storage facility
In 2025, two co-built companies developed commercial products, and AES was the first company to test and use the first versions of these products.
Fluence is a leading global provider of energy storage and services and AI-enabled digital applications for renewables and storage.
